title: anthemis cretica subsp. tenuiloba
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. tenuiloba, also known as the yarrow or small-leaved yarrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. tenuiloba include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
